spec_match.rationale: Directly explores the programmatic API of ProcessingInstruction, highlighting NodeFilter.SHOW_PROCESSING_INSTRUCTION selectors and TreeWalker queries.

interactive.rationale: Highly interactive workspace: creates custom PI nodes dynamically, applies target filters, walks the TreeWalker live, and displays structured logs.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Matches the parent index PI query explorer description perfectly.

edge_cases.rationale: Major DOM injection bugs exist. The walkTree function on line 308 and the findByTarget function on line 331 interpolate raw node data directly into innerHTML without escaping, exposing XSS routes. Additionally, the custom esc() helper on line 375 fails to escape single quotes, violating repository guidelines.

references.rationale: The page contains see also reference links but completely omits the required external ChromeStatus tracking reference link.

design_system.rationale: Perfect representation: leverage beautiful sandbox layouts, Ivory cards, black tables, and clean console output boxes.

openQuestions.title: Sanitize walkTree and findByTarget innerHTML outputs
openQuestions.detail: The walkTree (line 308) and findByTarget (line 331) functions interpolate raw node attributes directly into innerHTML. Rewrite these blocks to use textContent assignments or apply the esc() sanitizer to prevent HTML injection.

openQuestions.title: Fix esc helper to escape single quotes
openQuestions.detail: Update the custom esc() helper on line 375 to also escape single quotes '\'' (to ') as mandated by the repository's hard rules.

openQuestions.title: Cite ChromeStatus link in references
openQuestions.detail: Add the canonical link to https://chromestatus.com/feature/6534495085920256 in the see also links list at the bottom of the page.
